Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover

Class DeltaProcessor

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.DeltaProcessor
public class DeltaProcessor extends Object
Processor for proof tree deltas. This class manages listeners and maintains a current delta.
